summary.title: EU AI Act Governance Platform — Threat Model
summary.description:
An end-to-end AI governance and compliance automation platform 
that classifies AI systems into EU AI Act risk tiers, generates 
DPIA reports, runs OWASP LLM Top 10 assessments, and deploys 
a full DevSecOps pipeline on Azure using Terraform, Docker, and 
Kubernetes. This threat model identifies security threats across 
all system components using the STRIDE methodology.

diagrams.title: High Level Architecture Threats

threats.title: Tampering — Supply Chain Attack
threats.description: An attacker compromises a third party GitHub Action used in the pipeline and injects malicious code that gets deployed to production
threats.mitigation: All GitHub Actions pinned to specific commit SHA, not floating version tags. SAST and SCA scans run on every build. Dependency review enabled on repository.

threats.title: Denial of Service — API Flooding
threats.description: An attacker sends thousands of requests per second to overwhelm the API Gateway and make the platform unavailable
threats.mitigation: Rate limiting configured in Azure API Management. Kubernetes HPA automatically scales pods under high load.

threats.title: Tampering — Classification Result Manipulation
threats.description: An attacker intercepts and modifies the classification result between the classifier and the PDF generator, changing a High risk tier to Minimal
threats.mitigation: All internal service communication encrypted with TLS. Results signed before transmission.

threats.title: Tampering — Manipulated Assessment Results
threats.description: An attacker manipulates OWASP LLM assessment results to hide critical vulnerabilities from the compliance report
threats.mitigation: Results validated and signed before passing to PDF generator. Audit log records all assessment outputs.

threats.title: Tampering — Prompt Injection Attack
threats.description: An attacker crafts a malicious prompt that manipulates the RAG assistant into ignoring its system instructions and revealing sensitive information or producing harmful outputs
threats.mitigation: Input validation and sanitisation before passing to Azure OpenAI. LLM guardrails implemented. Output filtered before returning to user.

threats.title: Information Disclosure — Report Interception
threats.description: A generated PDF compliance report is intercepted in transit before reaching the user
threats.mitigation: All PDF transfers over TLS. Reports stored in private Azure Blob Storage with time-limited download links.

threats.title: Tampering — Prompt Injection Attack
threats.description: An attacker crafts a malicious prompt that manipulates the RAG assistant into ignoring its system instructions and revealing sensitive information or producing harmful outputs
threats.mitigation: Input validation and sanitisation before passing to Azure OpenAI. LLM guardrails implemented. Output filtered before returning to user.

threats.title: Information Disclosure — Database Breach
threats.description: An attacker gains unauthorised access to the PostgreSQL database containing all assessment history and audit logs
threats.mitigation: PostgreSQL deployed in private subnet with no public internet access. Connection requires service account credentials stored in Azure Key Vault. All data encrypted at rest.

threats.title: Spoofing — Unauthenticated API Access
threats.description: An attacker sends requests to the API Gateway pretending to be a legitimate user without valid credentials
threats.mitigation: Azure API Management enforces JWT token validation on all incoming requests. Invalid tokens are rejected before reaching any microservice.

threats.title: Elevation of Privilege — Secret Theft
threats.description: An attacker gains access to Azure Key Vault and steals API keys, database passwords, and encryption keys — giving them full access to all platform components
threats.mitigation: Azure Key Vault access controlled exclusively via Managed Identity. No passwords stored anywhere. All access logged and audited. RBAC enforced with principle of least privilege.

diagrams.description: STRIDE threat model covering all system components and trust boundaries
